query:
-- Verificar dados operacionais preservados
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor') as corretores_operacionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'gestor') as gestores_operacionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE origem != 'teste') as leads_operacionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agendamentos) as agendamentos_operacionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM visitas) as visitas_operacionais,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects) as projetos;

-- Verificar se ainda existem dados de teste
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR name LIKE '%test%') as users_test_remaining,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE email LIKE '%test%' OR nome LIKE '%test%') as leads_test_remaining;

-- Listar corretores operacionais
SELECT id, name, email, role, status FROM users WHERE role = 'corretor' ORDER BY name LIMIT 10;
